allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Oracle' | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft' | Select-Object Name")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU")
